channel.title: Walk-Forward on Judy AI Lab
channel.description: Recent content in Walk-Forward on Judy AI Lab

item.title: 100% Win Rate in Backtesting? Don't Celebrate Yet — Our Most Painful Lesson
item.description: We developed a mean reversion strategy. Backtesting showed 3 out of 8 combinations hitting 100% win rate. Then we ran Out-of-Sample validation, and 100% crashed to 25%. Here’s what happened.

item.title: Quantitative Trading System Build: From First Backtest Code to Paper Trading
item.description: We spent two weeks building a complete quantitative trading system from scratch — four strategies, eight Walk-Forward validations, Z-score statistical tests, Paper Trading. This article documents the entire process, including the biggest pitfalls we encountered.
